news_items.headline: Mets' Christian Scott answers team's challenge against Phillies: 'I thought it was a good kick in the a--'
news_items.summary: After the Mets' 4-1 win over the Philadelphia Phillies, Christian Scott explained how Andy Green's comments motivated him for this next start.

news_items.headline: Juan Soto exits with ‘a little’ calf soreness in injury concern Mets don’t expect to linger
news_items.summary: Calf injuries have already cost the Mets significantly this season, with both Juan Soto and Francisco Lindor missing time with them.

news_items.headline: Wander Franco making push to return to field after sexual abuse trial — but he might not be eligible
news_items.summary: Wander Franco wants to return to the baseball diamond.

news_items.headline: Dodgers pop-culture domination continues with Godzilla bobbleheads planned for regular-season finale
news_items.summary: The Dodgers' regular-season home finale against the San Diego Padres at UNIQLO Field at Dodger Stadium, will feature one of Japan's most iconic cultural exports.

news_items.headline: Three pressing questions facing Yankees ahead of second half
news_items.summary: The Post's Greg Joyce breaks down three questions that the Yankees will need to answer with the season set to resume after the All-Star break:

news_items.headline: Mets talk playing in poor air quality conditions after win over Phillies: 'Felt like I was breathing some metal'
news_items.summary: The Mets and Phillies played through a hazy, smoky atmosphere as the wildfires in Canada affected playing conditions on Thursday.
